stages.task: Speak with Mirel in the catacombs.
stages.description: Mirel Ardent keeps checking an empty cord at her wrist.

stages.task: Find Jarik near Hallowfen and give him the necklace.
stages.description: Mirel gave you Jarik's lucky necklace. Her husband left for Hallowfen chasing wall pay and forgot the charm he trusted most.
Jarik has his lucky necklace again.
